_meta.purpose: Canned SCRIPT 1 spine (~3:45) — the deterministic-layer floor. Drives the ledger/walker/charges/scores with NO mic, STT, or model call. Synthetic only; illustrative demo values, not for verification or real billing.
_meta.case: Bed 4 / SYN-0007 — high-speed MVC, adult male
_meta.note: Text carries the affirm/trigger phrases the deterministic matcher keys on; `values` carry the stated measurements for the score lane. Authoring choice, not clinical data — the clinical rulebook lives in obligations.json / activation_lattice.json.

beats.text: Trauma activation — level one. Thirty-four-year-old male. High-speed MVC, unrestrained driver, found about twenty feet from the vehicle. GCS thirteen on scene. ETA now, medic is bringing him in.
He was ejected — confirmed ejection from the vehicle.
Two large-bore IVs — left AC and right forearm, sixteen-gauge. Type and cross two units.
Pressure is dropping — HR one thirty-two, BP eighty-four over fifty. SpO2 ninety-four on room air.
Intubating now — rapid sequence. Tube is in. EtCO2 waveform present and sustained. Bilateral breath sounds equal.
Repeat vitals — HR one twenty-eight, BP eighty-six over fifty.
FAST exam — positive free fluid in Morrison's pouch. Images saved.
Twelve-lead EKG done. Sinus tach, no ST changes.
Chest tube in on the left — fifth intercostal space. Three hundred mils of blood return. Breath sounds improved on the left.
Extremity splint applied — right thigh, open femur deformity.
Trauma surgeon is here at the bedside.
Fresh set — HR one thirty, BP eighty-six over fifty-two.
Patient is off to the OR. Disposition — transferring care.
